creator: skreuzer@FreeBSD.org
text:
Can you resubmit this patch as a diff of the current version of the  
port.

Also, the port needs a few minor changes:

Install the files in lib/ into DATADIR instead of MALIB
Make the client search for the lib files in DATADIR instead of having  
to create a ~/.mangrc file

Thanks

--
Steven Kreuzer
http://www.exit2shell.com/~skreuzer
